title: selaginella cesatii
intro: Selaginella cesatii, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various conditions such as fever, headache, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella cesatii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Selaginella cesatii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusions, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
